_comment: Freshness manifest for secret/cert/key ROTATION runbooks (audit 360 dim.3 gap #secret-rotation). SIDECAR (not in-doc frontmatter) so stamping never shifts a runbook's line numbers — same rationale as doc-last-verified.json. Re-stamp a runbook's date (YYYY-MM-DD) when you re-verify its rotation procedure is still correct against the live infra. The sentinel fails if a listed runbook is missing or its date is > 120 days old (quarterly rotation cadence + buffer). Dates bootstrapped 2026-05-31 from each runbook's last substantive commit (honest last-touch, not a fabricated 'today'). Add a runbook once verified; removals only when retired.
